_comment_libs: baileys-antiban is vendored locally at ./libs/baileys-antiban (prebuilt CJS, no install needed). Its optional proxy-rotation feature needs http-proxy-agent/https-proxy-agent/socks-proxy-agent if you ever enable proxyRotator — not required for the default setup.
